mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user_session (user_id, session_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, expires_at, created_at, revoked_at FROM app_user_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user_session SET revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
